name: Cow Tipper's Curse
description:
A bit of cow tipping gets you more than you bargained for. Can you outlast the curse, or will you submit to the curse?

This bot contains:

  • Cow Transformation (TF)

  • Weight Gain

  • Gas

This was probably one of my favorite requests I got. Your character will only fully turn into a cow if they eat grass, in case you only want demi-human stuff. Hope y'all enjoy!
creator: Radabada
